name: memory
description: Supabase memory storage with scoped recall plus Markdown notes in lsl_memory.notes.
capability_summary: Stores/retrieves scoped memories and Markdown notes in Supabase with agent isolation and vault-backed credentials.

parameters.name: agent_id
parameters.description: Logical agent namespace (for example lisa, bob) used to isolate memory records.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Project workspace identifier for memory partitioning.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Memory content to persist in remember mode.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Optional search text used by recall mode.

commands.name: remember
commands.description: Store one memory item for a scoped agent/project pair.

commands.name: recall
commands.description: Retrieve memory items for a scoped agent/project pair.

commands.name: add-note
commands.description: Store a Markdown note in lsl_memory.notes.

commands.name: get-note
commands.description: Retrieve Markdown notes by agent with optional id/title filtering.
